alerts.text: CEASEFIRE ACTIVE. 2-week pause from Apr 8. Pakistan-hosted talks Islamabad Apr 10. S1→15, S10→80, S12→80. Path C rises to 20%.
WSO RESCUED Apr 5. Path F invalidation met — both pilots recovered. But cost: 2x C-130, 4x MH-6, 1x A-10, 2x Black Hawk damaged. S1b spikes.
PATH F REVISED 25→8%. Precedent set — SAR cascade CAN happen but was contained. S1b theatre util 68→75 on aircraft losses.
PATH E REVISED 5→15%. 48hr ultimatum active. Bridge strike crossed civilian line. Energy infra targeting now credible.

events.label: Ras Laffan LNG struck by IRGC
Isfahan missile storage struck by IDF
Kharg Island mil facilities — oil infra spared
F-15E shot down over Iran. Pilot rescued. WSO missing.
B1 Bridge Karaj — first civilian infra targeting. 8 killed 95+ wounded.
A-10 Warthog hit during SAR — pilot ejected safely over Gulf
HH-60 Pave Hawk hit by ground fire — crew wounded, flew out
Trump: 48hrs to reopen Hormuz or energy infra targeted
WSO rescued — Zagros Mountains. CIA deception. SEAL Team Six. Massive firefight.
2x C-130 destroyed (stuck on ground), 4x MH-6 destroyed, aircraft losses mount
Strike hits perimeter of Bushehr nuclear power plant
2-week ceasefire announced. Trump dinner schedule + own deadline convergence. Pakistan mediation.
Pakistan-hosted talks — Islamabad. Iran FM + US envoy (indirect).

cross_theatre_couplings.U4_S111: Both fertiliser supply — Ukraine block + Gulf block = compounding NH planting crisis
cross_theatre_couplings.U8_S110: Orenburg + Ras Laffan = 35% world helium offline simultaneously
cross_theatre_couplings.U5_S1b: NATO ships in Gulf are NATO ships not in Atlantic — coupling to Russian sub activity
cross_theatre_couplings.U7_S12: Kremlin mediation on Hormuz is leverage for Ukraine concessions
cross_theatre_couplings.U2_S80a: Black Sea grain disruption + Gulf food cascade = global food stress amplification

event_ledger.title: IDF strikes Nabatieh — 3rd Litani violation in 48h
event_ledger.body: UNIFIL filed report. LAF static. Hezbollah rhetorical only.

event_ledger.title: Damascus airport runway struck — Hezbollah resupply degraded
event_ledger.body: L7 climbing. LB-5 compounding precondition building.

event_ledger.title: Naim Qassem speech — operational language shift
event_ledger.body: Defiance→readiness framing. Al-Manar amplifying. L2 ticking up.
